title: verbascum × duernsteinense
intro: Verbascum × duernsteinense, also known as Duernstein's mullein, is a sterile hybrid plant of the Verbascum genus, belonging to the figwort family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × duernsteinense include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting relaxation. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
